step_rationale: Classical complement activation post-infarct; myocardial injury-associated inflammation.
mechanism: Complement C1q is activated post-infarction by exposure of myocardial autoantigens and contributes to inflammatory myocardial injury.

references.title: Plasma-derived Extracellular Vesicles Contain Predictive Biomarkers and Potential Therapeutic Targets for Myocardial Ischemic (MI) Injury.
